name: Classic Sri Lanka
tagline: The perfect introduction to the island's highlights.
description: Discover the very best of Sri Lanka on this comprehensive 10-day journey. From the ancient cities of the Cultural Triangle to the misty tea plantations of the Hill Country and the golden beaches of the south coast, this tour covers the island's most iconic destinations with the comfort of a private driver.

addOns.name: Airport Pickup
addOns.description: Meet & greet at Bandaranaike International Airport

addOns.name: Welcome Pack
addOns.description: Local SIM card, bottled water, snacks & guidebook

addOns.name: Premium Safari Jeep
addOns.description: Upgrade to a private jeep for Yala safari

itinerary.title: Airport to Negombo
itinerary.description: Your driver meets you at Bandaranaike International Airport and transfers you to your beachside hotel in Negombo. Take the evening to relax, explore the fishing village, and sample fresh seafood at the beach.

itinerary.title: Negombo to Anuradhapura
itinerary.description: Journey north to the ancient capital of Anuradhapura, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Explore the sacred Bodhi Tree — the oldest historically documented tree in the world — and the impressive dagobas (stupas) that dot this ancient city.

itinerary.title: Anuradhapura to Sigiriya
itinerary.description: Drive to Sigiriya and climb the iconic Lion Rock fortress, a 5th-century palace perched atop a 200-metre rock column. Admire the ancient frescoes and the remarkable water gardens at the base. In the afternoon, visit the cave temples of Dambulla.

itinerary.title: Sigiriya to Polonnaruwa & Minneriya
itinerary.description: Explore the medieval capital of Polonnaruwa with its remarkably preserved ruins and impressive stone sculptures. In the late afternoon, take a jeep safari at Minneriya National Park to see the famous elephant gathering.

itinerary.title: Sigiriya to Kandy
itinerary.description: Wind through the lush countryside to Kandy, Sri Lanka's cultural capital. Visit a spice garden en route. In the evening, attend the mesmerising Kandyan dance performance and visit the Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic.

itinerary.title: Kandy to Nuwara Eliya
itinerary.description: Drive into the misty highlands past emerald tea plantations. Visit a working tea factory to learn how Ceylon's finest tea is produced. Arrive in Nuwara Eliya, known as 'Little England' for its colonial-era charm.

itinerary.title: Nuwara Eliya to Ella
itinerary.description: One of the most scenic drives in Sri Lanka. Wind through tea country, stopping at viewpoints and the famous Nine Arches Bridge. Consider taking the Ella to Kandy train for part of the journey (one of the world's most beautiful train rides).

itinerary.title: Ella to Yala
itinerary.description: Descend from the highlands to the dry zone and Sri Lanka's most famous national park. Enjoy an afternoon safari in Yala, home to the highest density of leopards in the world, plus elephants, bears, and incredible birdlife.

itinerary.title: Yala to Galle
itinerary.description: Drive along the stunning southern coast to Galle. Explore the UNESCO-listed Galle Fort with its cobblestone streets, colonial architecture, boutique shops, and ocean-facing ramparts perfect for sunset.

itinerary.title: Galle to Airport
itinerary.description: Take the scenic coastal road or the Southern Expressway back to Colombo. If time allows, stop in Colombo for shopping at the Pettah Market or a visit to Gangaramaya Temple before heading to the airport.

name: Wild Sri Lanka
description: An 8-day wildlife-focused adventure across Sri Lanka's best national parks. Track leopards in Yala, watch elephants gather at Minneriya, explore the wetlands of Bundala, and discover the marine wonders of Mirissa. Perfect for nature photographers and wildlife enthusiasts.

addOns.name: Airport Pickup
addOns.description: Meet & greet at Bandaranaike International Airport

addOns.name: Whale Watching Trip
addOns.description: Early morning boat trip from Mirissa harbour

addOns.name: Photography Guide
addOns.description: Professional wildlife photography guide for one safari

itinerary.title: Airport to Habarana
itinerary.description: Your driver collects you from Bandaranaike Airport and transfers you north to Habarana, the gateway to the Cultural Triangle and surrounding national parks. Settle into your eco-lodge surrounded by jungle.

itinerary.title: Minneriya Safari & Sigiriya
itinerary.description: Early morning visit to Sigiriya Rock Fortress. In the late afternoon, head to Minneriya National Park for the famous 'Gathering' — one of Asia's greatest wildlife spectacles, where hundreds of elephants congregate around the ancient reservoir.

itinerary.title: Habarana to Knuckles Range
itinerary.description: Journey into the Knuckles Mountain Range, a UNESCO World Heritage biodiversity hotspot. Trek through cloud forests spotting endemic birds, rare orchids, and if lucky, the elusive purple-faced langur.

itinerary.title: Kandy to Udawalawe
itinerary.description: Drive south through the hill country to Udawalawe National Park. Take an afternoon safari to see herds of wild elephants in their natural habitat — Udawalawe has one of the highest elephant densities in Asia.

itinerary.title: Udawalawe to Yala
itinerary.description: Continue east to Yala National Park, home to the world's highest concentration of leopards. Take an early morning and late afternoon safari for the best chance of leopard sightings, plus sloth bears, crocodiles, and over 200 bird species.

itinerary.title: Yala & Bundala
itinerary.description: Morning safari at Yala for another chance at leopard tracking. Afternoon visit to Bundala National Park, a Ramsar wetland famous for its flamingo flocks, painted storks, and incredible migratory bird populations.

itinerary.title: Yala to Mirissa
itinerary.description: Drive along the beautiful south coast to Mirissa. If booked, take an early morning whale watching trip to spot blue whales and spinner dolphins. Spend the afternoon relaxing on one of Sri Lanka's finest beaches.

itinerary.title: Mirissa to Airport
itinerary.description: Final scenic drive along the coast and back to Bandaranaike Airport. Stop at a sea turtle hatchery on the way, or visit the mangrove ecosystem at Madu River if time allows.

name: Beaches & Culture
description: A 12-day journey that perfectly balances Sri Lanka's rich cultural heritage with its stunning coastline. Explore ancient temples and colonial forts, then unwind on palm-fringed beaches. Ideal for those who want the best of both worlds.

addOns.name: Airport Pickup
addOns.description: Meet & greet at Bandaranaike International Airport

addOns.name: Snorkelling Trip
addOns.description: Guided snorkelling at Pigeon Island or Unawatuna

addOns.name: Sri Lankan Cooking Class
addOns.description: Half-day cooking class with local family

itinerary.title: Airport to Negombo
itinerary.description: Arrive and transfer to your beach hotel. Explore the fishing village at sunset.

itinerary.title: Negombo to Sigiriya
itinerary.description: Journey to the Cultural Triangle. Climb the iconic Sigiriya Rock Fortress and explore the ancient water gardens.

itinerary.title: Polonnaruwa & Village Tour
itinerary.description: Explore the medieval capital's ruins, then experience village life with a catamaran ride and bullock cart tour.

itinerary.title: Sigiriya to Trincomalee
itinerary.description: Head to Sri Lanka's stunning east coast. Swim in the crystal-clear waters of Nilaveli beach.

itinerary.title: Trincomalee Beach Day
itinerary.description: Full day of beach bliss. Visit Pigeon Island for snorkelling or explore the historic Koneswaram Temple perched on Swami Rock.

itinerary.title: Trincomalee to Kandy
itinerary.description: Cross the island to the hill capital. Visit the Temple of the Tooth and enjoy a Kandyan dance performance.

itinerary.title: Kandy & Surrounds
itinerary.description: Visit the Royal Botanical Gardens, explore a tea plantation, and browse Kandy's vibrant market.

itinerary.title: Kandy to Ella
itinerary.description: Scenic mountain drive through tea country. Walk to Nine Arches Bridge and enjoy Ella's laid-back vibe.

itinerary.title: Ella to South Coast
itinerary.description: Descend to the tranquil south coast. Relax on Tangalle's secluded beaches.

itinerary.title: Mirissa & Whale Watching
itinerary.description: Optional early-morning whale watching trip. Spend the day on Mirissa's crescent beach.

itinerary.title: Galle Fort
itinerary.description: Explore the UNESCO-listed Galle Fort. Boutique shops, galleries, and sunset on the ramparts.

itinerary.title: Galle to Airport
itinerary.description: Scenic drive to the airport via the coast. Optional stop at a turtle hatchery.

name: Hill Country Explorer
tagline: Rolling tea estates and misty mountain peaks.
description: A focused 7-day journey through Sri Lanka's breathtaking hill country. Wind through emerald tea plantations, hike to stunning viewpoints, ride the world-famous hill country train, and discover charming colonial towns. Perfect for nature lovers and active travellers.

addOns.name: Airport Pickup
addOns.description: Meet & greet at Bandaranaike International Airport

addOns.name: Train Tickets
addOns.description: Reserved observation car seats for scenic train ride

addOns.name: Adam's Peak Guide
addOns.description: Local guide for the sunrise pilgrimage hike

itinerary.title: Airport to Kandy
itinerary.description: Your driver meets you at the airport and transfers you to Kandy. Visit the Temple of the Tooth in the evening.

itinerary.title: Kandy & Knuckles Range
itinerary.description: Morning at Peradeniya Botanical Gardens. Afternoon trek in the Knuckles Mountain Range through cloud forest.

itinerary.title: Kandy to Nuwara Eliya
itinerary.description: Drive through rolling tea estates, stopping at a tea factory. Explore the colonial charm of 'Little England'.

itinerary.title: Horton Plains
itinerary.description: Pre-dawn departure to Horton Plains National Park. Hike to World's End — a sheer cliff with 880m drop and panoramic views. Continue to Baker's Falls.

itinerary.title: Nuwara Eliya to Ella (Train)
itinerary.description: Take the world-famous scenic train from Nanu Oya to Ella. Your driver meets you in Ella. Walk to Nine Arches Bridge for sunset.

itinerary.title: Ella Adventures
itinerary.description: Hike Little Adam's Peak for panoramic views. Visit Ravana Falls and explore Ella's charming cafés. Optional visit to a spice garden.

itinerary.title: Ella to Airport
itinerary.description: Drive back through the highlands and plains to the airport. Stop at Buduruwagala rock carvings if time allows.
